marketing.heroSubtitle: Upload invoices or receipts and see how Charmy extracts financial data instantly.
marketing.heroDesc1: Upload invoices or receipts and let Charmy extract financial data
marketing.noCreditCard: No credit card required · Free demo available
marketing.problemTitle: Accounting teams waste hours <1>entering invoice data.</1>
marketing.problemDesc: Businesses and accountants receive piles of invoices and receipts that must be opened, read, and typed manually into accounting systems. This repetitive work wastes valuable time.
marketing.solutionDesc: Upload invoices or forward them by email. Charmy reads the documents and extracts structured financial data automatically.
marketing.howItWorksDesc: Four steps from document to structured accounting data.
marketing.step1Desc: Upload invoices or forward them to your unique Charmy email address.
marketing.step2Desc: AI reads and extracts all financial data fields automatically.
marketing.step3Desc: Confirm the extracted fields. Edit anything that needs correction.
marketing.step4Desc: Export structured, accountant-ready CSV files in one click.
marketing.everyFieldDesc: Charmy extracts the data your accountant needs — no manual entry required.
marketing.firmSectionDesc: Accounting firms often receive invoices and receipts from many different client companies. Charmy allows you to create a separate workspace for each client so documents stay organized and easy to manage.
marketing.firmSectionDesc2: Accountants can switch between companies instantly and export financial data for each client independently.
marketing.firmBenefit1Title: Create a workspace for every client company
marketing.firmBenefit1Desc: Keep invoices, receipts, and financial documents separated.
marketing.firmBenefit2Desc: Move between companies without logging in and out.
marketing.firmBenefit3Title: Export clean data for each client
marketing.firmBenefit3Desc: Prepare organized financial records for accounting.
marketing.firmNote: The Accounting Firm plan allows you to manage up to 10 client workspaces from one Charmy account.
marketing.benefit3: Import documents by upload or email
marketing.installDesc: No app store needed. Add Charmy to your home screen or desktop for instant access, offline support, and a native app experience.
marketing.footerDesc: AI-powered financial document processing for modern businesses.
marketing.tryInstantlyDesc: Upload an invoice or receipt and see how Charmy extracts financial data automatically.
marketing.ctaDesc: Upload invoices and receipts or forward them by email. Charmy extracts the financial data instantly.
marketing.proCtaDesc: For freelancers and businesses managing their own invoices and receipts.
marketing.firmCtaDesc: Manage up to 10 client workspaces from one account.

features.heroTitle: Everything you need to process invoices <1>automatically</1>
features.heroDesc: Charmy converts invoices and receipts into structured financial data using AI.
features.uploadDesc: Drag and drop PDF, JPG, or PNG files. Upload invoices, receipts, and supplier bills directly to Charmy.
features.uploadCap3: Support for PDF, JPG, and PNG
features.emailDesc: Forward supplier invoices directly to your Charmy email address. The system automatically imports attachments and processes them.
features.emailCap1: Dedicated email address for your workspace
features.aiDesc: Charmy extracts supplier, invoice number, VAT, totals, currency, and dates from your documents automatically.
features.reviewDesc: Verify extracted data quickly with document preview. Process many invoices quickly with a clean review interface.
features.catDesc: Create rules to categorize expenses automatically. Search, filter, and manage your entire document history.
features.catCap3: Filter by supplier, date, amount, or status
features.exportDesc: Export expenses and income data to CSV, Excel, or PDF. One-click export of accountant-ready reports.
features.firmSectionDesc: If you're an accountant or bookkeeper managing invoices for multiple clients, the Accounting Firm plan lets you create separate workspaces per company — all managed from one account.
features.firmCap1Desc: Create a workspace for each client. Documents, expenses, and exports are fully isolated per company.
features.firmCap2Desc: Invite team members and assign them to specific client workspaces based on their role.
features.firmCap3Desc: Move between client workspaces instantly from the sidebar — no need to log in and out.
features.firmCap4Desc: Export financial data, invoices, and reports separately for each company.
features.learnAboutFirm: Learn about the Accounting Firm plan
features.firmManageDesc: The Accounting Firm plan allows you to manage up to 10 client workspaces from one Charmy account. Perfect for accounting firms, bookkeeping services, and financial consultants.
features.firmPlanItems: 10 client workspaces,One-time €99 payment,Lifetime access,All Pro features included
features.separateWorkspacesDesc: Each client company has its own workspace with separate invoices, receipts, contacts, and exports.
features.instantSwitchingDesc: Move between companies with a single click without logging in and out.
features.clientCollaborationDesc: Invite clients to upload invoices and receipts directly into their workspace.
features.organizedDataDesc: Charmy extracts financial data automatically and keeps records structured.
features.exportPerClientDesc: Generate exports and financial data for each client independently.
features.dataIsolationDesc: Every workspace is fully isolated — client data never mixes between workspaces.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.heroDesc: Let Charmy process your invoices automatically so you can focus on more important work.
pricing.proDesc: Everything you need to process invoices and manage expenses effortlessly.
pricing.firmDesc: For accountants and bookkeeping firms. Manage up to 10 client companies from one account.
pricing.whyAccountantsDesc1: Accountants often receive piles of invoices from multiple clients. Instead of chasing files across emails, folders, and spreadsheets — process client invoices in dedicated workspaces and export clean financial data faster.
pricing.whyAccountantsDesc2: The Accounting Firm plan is a one-time purchase of €99 that gives you access to up to 10 client workspaces inside Charmy. Each workspace keeps documents fully separated, searchable, and ready to export.
pricing.whyAccountantsNote: Ideal for firms managing documents for multiple clients from one central platform.
pricing.firmFaqDesc: Everything you need to know about managing multiple client workspaces.
pricing.generalFaqDesc: Everything you need to know about Charmy's pricing and plans.
pricing.firmFaq1Q: What is included in the Accounting Firm plan?
pricing.firmFaq1A: The Accounting Firm plan gives you access to a dedicated accountant dashboard inside Charmy, where you can create and manage up to 10 separate client workspaces.
pricing.firmFaq2Q: How many client workspaces are included?
pricing.firmFaq2A: The plan includes up to 10 client workspaces. This allows you to manage invoices, receipts, and financial documents for up to 10 different client companies from one Charmy account.
pricing.firmFaq3Q: Can I create separate workspaces for each customer?
pricing.firmFaq3A: Yes. Each client can have their own dedicated workspace with separate documents, settings, contacts, exports, and financial data.
pricing.firmFaq4Q: Can my team access multiple client workspaces?
pricing.firmFaq4A: Yes. You can invite team members and assign them access to one or more client workspaces depending on their role.
pricing.firmFaq5Q: What happens when I reach 10 workspaces?
pricing.firmFaq5A: Once you reach your workspace limit, you will not be able to create additional workspaces unless extra capacity is granted.
pricing.firmFaq6Q: Is the €99 fee one-time or recurring?
pricing.firmFaq6A: The Accounting Firm plan is a €99 one-time fee. There are no recurring charges — you pay once and get lifetime access.
pricing.firmFaq7Q: Can I buy more workspaces later?
pricing.firmFaq7A: Yes. The system is designed to support future add-on workspace packs or upgraded firm plans.
pricing.firmFaq8Q: Can I export data separately for each client?
pricing.firmFaq8A: Yes. Each client workspace is fully isolated, so you can export financial data separately for each company.
pricing.faq1Q: Is the Pro plan a one-time payment?
pricing.faq1A: Yes. The Pro plan is a one-time payment of €29.99. There are no recurring charges.
pricing.faq2Q: Can I cancel or get a refund?
pricing.faq2A: Since the Pro plan is a one-time purchase, there are no recurring charges to cancel. If you have any issues, please contact our support team.
pricing.faq3Q: What counts as a processed document?
pricing.faq3A: A processed document is any invoice, receipt, or financial document that Charmy reads and extracts financial data from.
pricing.faq4Q: Can accountants use Charmy for multiple clients?
pricing.faq4A: Yes. With the Accounting Firm plan, you get up to 10 separate client workspaces.
pricing.faq5Q: What is the Accounting Firm plan?
pricing.faq5A: The Accounting Firm plan is a one-time purchase of €99 that gives you access to up to 10 client workspaces inside Charmy.
pricing.faq6Q: Can I change my plan later?
pricing.faq6A: Yes. You can upgrade from Pro to the Accounting Firm plan at any time.
pricing.faq7A: Yes. Charmy processes documents using secure cloud infrastructure and encrypted connections. GDPR-compliant data handling.
pricing.faq8Q: Can I try Charmy before paying?
pricing.faq8A: Yes. You can test Charmy instantly by uploading a sample invoice on the homepage demo.

faq.title: Frequently Asked <1>Questions</1>
faq.desc: Everything you need to know about Charmy and AI invoice processing.
faq.q1: Can I try Charmy before creating an account?
faq.a1: Yes. You can try Charmy instantly on our homepage by uploading an invoice or receipt. The demo lets you see exactly how Charmy extracts financial data from documents before you sign up. No account required.
faq.q2: What types of documents can Charmy process?
faq.a2: Charmy supports the most common financial document formats including PDF invoices, JPG images, PNG images, and scanned receipts. You can upload files manually or send them via email.
faq.q3: Can I send invoices by email instead of uploading them?
faq.a3: Yes. Every Charmy workspace includes a dedicated email address where you can forward invoices.
faq.q4: What information does Charmy extract from invoices?
faq.a4: Charmy automatically extracts key financial fields including supplier name, invoice number, invoice date, currency, subtotal, VAT amount, and total amount.
faq.a5: Charmy is designed for professionals who deal with invoices regularly — accountants and bookkeepers, small businesses, freelancers and consultants, and finance teams.
faq.q6: How accurate is the AI extraction?
faq.a6: Charmy uses advanced AI document processing models trained to recognize financial document structures. In most cases, invoice fields are extracted automatically and require minimal review.
faq.a7: Yes. Charmy processes documents using secure infrastructure and encrypted connections. GDPR-compliant data handling.
faq.q8: Can I organize and categorize expenses?
faq.a8: Yes. Charmy allows you to categorize invoices and create automatic rules based on supplier names or document data.
faq.q9: Can I export my data for accounting?
faq.a9: Yes. Charmy lets you export financial data into formats suitable for accountants, including CSV, spreadsheet formats, and structured financial reports.
faq.q10: Do I need accounting software to use Charmy?
faq.a10: No. Charmy focuses specifically on document processing and financial data extraction.

about.heroDesc: Accounting teams spend too much time manually entering invoice data. Charmy was created to eliminate repetitive financial document processing.
about.missionStatement: Turn financial documents into structured accounting data automatically.
about.missionP1: Charmy was born from a simple observation: accountants and finance teams spend an enormous amount of time manually entering data from invoices and receipts into spreadsheets and accounting systems.
about.missionP2: With advances in AI and document understanding, we saw an opportunity to automate this entire workflow. Upload a document, let AI extract the data, review it, and export it — all in minutes instead of hours.
about.missionP3: Our team combines expertise in AI, fintech, and accounting to build a platform that truly understands financial documents and the needs of accounting professionals.
about.accuracyFirstDesc: We obsess over extraction accuracy because your financial data must be correct. Every decimal matters.
about.simplicityDesc: Complex technology, simple experience. We believe powerful tools should feel effortless to use.
about.securityPrivacyDesc: GDPR-compliant from day one. Your documents are encrypted, protected, and never shared.
about.speedEfficiencyDesc: Process documents in seconds, not hours. We're building the fastest invoice processing platform.

contact.heroSubtitle: Have questions about Charmy? Our team is ready to assist.
contact.tellUsDesc: Whether you have a question about features, pricing, or anything else — our team is ready to help.
contact.fastResponseDesc: We typically respond within 2–4 hours during business hours. For urgent matters, reach out via phone.
contact.name: Name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about your needs...
contact.privacyNote: By submitting this form, you agree to our Privacy Policy.

demo.heroDesc: Upload any invoice or receipt and watch Charmy extract supplier details, amounts, VAT, dates, and more — in seconds.
demo.whatExtractsDesc: Upload a document above and Charmy will automatically identify and extract these fields.
demo.step1Desc: Drag and drop or click to upload any invoice, receipt, or bill. PDF, JPG, and PNG supported up to 10MB.
demo.step2Desc: Charmy's AI analyzes the document, identifies key fields, and extracts structured financial data in seconds.
demo.step3Desc: See every extracted field clearly presented. That's exactly what the full platform does — at scale, with exports and team collaboration.
